records.m_Talk_FRA: How much time did they say they would need to send all the children?

They say that half a day would be enough
8v

They say that half a day would be enough
8v

They say that half a day would be enough
8v

records.m_Talk_FRA: No need to worry about that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're going to hold this place until those monsters retreat.

records.m_Talk_FRA: We're going to hold this place until those monsters retreat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You all heard!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You all heard!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You all heard!

records.m_Talk_DEU: Prepare for battle! The Demon Lord's army is coming!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Prepare for battle! The Demon Lord's army is coming!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mommy... Can't you come with?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mommy... Can't you come with?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mommy... Can't you come with?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay, sweety. You'll meet Mommy in the Promised Land, but it's just that you're going there first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay, sweety. You'll meet Mommy in the Promised Land, but it's just that you're going there first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay, sweety. You'll meet Mommy in the Promised Land, but it's just that you're going there first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's ready, High Priest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's ready, High Priest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's ready, High Priest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Very well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Very well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Very well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cutie, you are the only one left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cutie, you are the only one left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cutie, you are the only one left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, I'm not going...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, I'm not going...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, I'm not going...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't you hear that monsters are coming?! So why do I have to go?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't you hear that monsters are coming?! So why do I have to go?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't you hear that monsters are coming?! So why do I have to go?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because you are the Stump's tenth lightest child.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because you are the Stump's tenth lightest child.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because you are the Stump's tenth lightest child.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a rule that everyone in the Stump has agreed to.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a rule that everyone in the Stump has agreed to.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a rule that everyone in the Stump has agreed to.

records.m_Talk_ENG: NO! That's a rule that you all decided without me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: NO! That's a rule that you all decided without me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: NO! That's a rule that you all decided without me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Promised Land needs you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Promised Land needs you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Promised Land needs you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We need a strong person to lead those children.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We need a strong person to lead those children.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We need a strong person to lead those children.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That goes for this place too!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That goes for this place too!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That goes for this place too!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The gelid lands need me more than... the Promised Land we dreamt of!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The gelid lands need me more than... the Promised Land we dreamt of!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The gelid lands need me more than... the Promised Land we dreamt of!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it because I lost my power?! Is that why you don't need me anymore?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it because I lost my power?! Is that why you don't need me anymore?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it because I lost my power?! Is that why you don't need me anymore?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Morgana...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Morgana...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Morgana...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It does not matter if you do not like it. There are no exceptions to this rule.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It does not matter if you do not like it. There are no exceptions to this rule.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It does not matter if you do not like it. There are no exceptions to this rule.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Time is running out. If you keep refusing, I have no choice but to force you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Time is running out. If you keep refusing, I have no choice but to force you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Time is running out. If you keep refusing, I have no choice but to force you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, excuse me, Miss Morgana.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, excuse me, Miss Morgana.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, excuse me, Miss Morgana.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, stop it! Let go of me! I said, let me go!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, stop it! Let go of me! I said, let me go!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, stop it! Let go of me! I said, let me go!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...? Why can't I escape even using all my strength?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...? Why can't I escape even using all my strength?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...? Why can't I escape even using all my strength?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Merlin...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Merlin...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Merlin...!!

records.m_Talk_DEU: Decompression complete...! Adjusting the spatial-temporal phase difference in coordinates...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Decompression complete...! Adjusting the spatial-temporal phase difference in coordinates...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, it is only a matter of time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, it is only a matter of time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, it is only a matter of time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You stay here and protect the children.

records.m_Talk_FRA: You stay here and protect the children.

root.m_Talk_DEU: No, I'm not going...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, I'm not going...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't you hear that monsters are coming?! So why do I have to go?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't you hear that monsters are coming?! So why do I have to go?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't you hear that monsters are coming?! So why do I have to go?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because you are the Stump's tenth lightest child.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because you are the Stump's tenth lightest child.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because you are the Stump's tenth lightest child.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is a rule that everyone in the Stump has agreed to.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is a rule that everyone in the Stump has agreed to.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is a rule that everyone in the Stump has agreed to.

root.m_Talk_ENG: NO! That's a rule that you all decided without me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: NO! That's a rule that you all decided without me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: NO! That's a rule that you all decided without me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Promised Land needs you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Promised Land needs you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Promised Land needs you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We need a strong person to lead those children.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We need a strong person to lead those children.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We need a strong person to lead those children.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That goes for this place too!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That goes for this place too!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That goes for this place too!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The gelid lands need me more than... the Promised Land we dreamt of!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The gelid lands need me more than... the Promised Land we dreamt of!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The gelid lands need me more than... the Promised Land we dreamt of!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is it because I lost my power?! Is that why you don't need me anymore?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is it because I lost my power?! Is that why you don't need me anymore?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is it because I lost my power?! Is that why you don't need me anymore?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Morgana...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Morgana...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Morgana...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It does not matter if you do not like it. There are no exceptions to this rule.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It does not matter if you do not like it. There are no exceptions to this rule.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It does not matter if you do not like it. There are no exceptions to this rule.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Time is running out. If you keep refusing, I have no choice but to force you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Time is running out. If you keep refusing, I have no choice but to force you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Time is running out. If you keep refusing, I have no choice but to force you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, excuse me, Miss Morgana.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, excuse me, Miss Morgana.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, excuse me, Miss Morgana.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, stop it! Let go of me! I said, let me go!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, stop it! Let go of me! I said, let me go!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, stop it! Let go of me! I said, let me go!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...? Why can't I escape even using all my strength?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...? Why can't I escape even using all my strength?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...? Why can't I escape even using all my strength?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Merlin...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Merlin...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Merlin...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Decompression complete...! Adjusting the spatial-temporal phase difference in coordinates...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Decompression complete...! Adjusting the spatial-temporal phase difference in coordinates...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Decompression complete...! Adjusting the spatial-temporal phase difference in coordinates...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, it is only a matter of time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, it is only a matter of time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, it is only a matter of time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You stay here and protect the children.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You stay here and protect the children.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You stay here and protect the children.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... what about you, High Priest?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... what about you, High Priest?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... what about you, High Priest?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I do not intend on letting uninvited guests in.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I do not intend on letting uninvited guests in.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I do not intend on letting uninvited guests in.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I shall teach those rude monsters a lesson.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I shall teach those rude monsters a lesson.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I shall teach those rude monsters a lesson.
